qas.q: What is the Fitness Program AFI?
What is the Installation Commander's responsibilities in regards to the fitness program?
qas.a:
Ensures CCs implement and maintain unit fitness standards.

Provides manpower/facilities/equipment/resources/funding

qas.q: What are the Force Support Squadron Commander's responsibilities in regards to the fitness program?
qas.a:
Responsible for the overall functioning and management of the FSC and the FAC.

Ensures food service personnel have knowledge, skills, and training necessary for food preparation to maximise the nutritional value of foods and promote the purchase and consumption of healthy food options.

Provides unit PTLs a the FSC orientation to include group PT class set up, equipment use, and safety procedures.

Report monthly statistics to Wing/CC / Unit/CC

qas.q: What level of training do Fitness Assessments conductors need to have at a minimum?
Who can FAC members NOT test?
qas.a: Members from their own unit/Personal Accounting Symbol (PAS) code.

qas.q: T/F: FAC augmentees can perform AC measurements on Airmen of the same gender?
qas.a: FALSE /If no augmentees of the same gender are available, a witness of the same gender must be present.

qas.q: What are the ratios for FAC Testers/Airmen testing?
What form do you document Fitness Assessments on?
qas.a: AF Form 4446 - Air Force Fitness Assessment Scorecard

qas.q: Who inputs Fitness Assessments scores into AFFMS II and how long do they have to do it?
qas.a:
FAC Manager (or others per local guidance)/Five Duty Days

*Cannot update scores from Airmen from their own PAS code.

qas.q: How long do AF Form 4446s have to be held?
What do you do for UNSATISFACTORY FAs?
qas.a: Maintain the AF Form 4446, FSQ and any applicable AF Forms 469, until the Airman achieves a passing score or for 24 months, whichever is earlier.

qas.q: What do Airmen in PCS status need to do if they have an UNSATISFACTORY FA score?
qas.a: Hand carry a copy of their unsatisfactory score sheet to their next station and provide to UFPM upon inprocessing.

qas.q: What are the Unit CCs responsibilities?
qas.a:
Executes & Enforces unit FP/ensures administrative action in cases of non-compliance

Appoints individuals in writing to conduct FAs in support of the FAC (augmentees)

Recommends Med Review for any Airmen who receives four component exceptions in a 24 month period

Appoints PTLs in writing to lead unit PT.

Appoints UFPMs in writing, provides letter to FAC

Seals and mails open and closed fitness case files to gaining CCs for PCS

Directs unit run practice tests at his/her discretion.

qas.q: How long will a losing UFPM retain a copy of fitness case files?
T/F: An Airman's FA score must be current before deploying?
T/F: Chain of Command can take adverse action based solely on the results of unofficial practice tests?
What are the responsibilities of the UFPM?
qas.a:
Must be PTLB certified, will augment the FAC to conduct official FAs

(If FAC doesn't exist, updates scores in AFFMS II within 5 duty days.)

Provides FSQ to Airmen to complete prior to any un/official PA. Refers high risk to Med.

Completes training annually
